title: Community Hospital of Anaconda ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Community Hospital of Anaconda, located in Anaconda, Montana, is a healthcare facility dedicated to providing comprehensive medical services to the local community. It offers a range of services including emergency care, inpatient and outpatient treatments, surgical procedures, and specialized care. The hospital is committed to delivering high-quality, patient-centered care in a compassionate and supportive environment.
